prestazioni: VR30DDTT (3.0L Twin-Turbo V6) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (CPE Performance) and a Tomei 3.5" titanium exhaust system with 304 stainless steel tips. Requires VR30DDTT-specific fuel system upgrade including dual Walbro 450LPH in-tank pumps and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

VR30DDTT-specific ECU reflash via Cobb Accessport (v3) with custom dyno-tuned map by EcuTek ProECU (Stage 2+ aggressive timing, 22psi peak boost, and 93 octane fuel compensation). Includes upgraded intercooler from GReddy Type-25 FMIC (5.5" core thickness, 1000cfm airflow) with custom silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance (4-ply aramid reinforcement).

Drivetrain reinforcement: VR30DDTT-specific Z1 Motorsports 80W-140 LSD differential with 4.11 final drive ratio, upgraded Q50-specific axles from The Driveshaft Shop (Level 5 carbon fiber driveshaft, 3.5" diameter), and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily dual-disc clutch with billet flywheel (800ft-lb torque capacity). Suspension includes Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Q50-specific valving, 20-way adjustable damping) with Eibach ERS 800lb/in springs and polyurethane subframe bushings from 034Motorsport.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Q50 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG DBC basecoat) and clear bra (XPEL Ultimate Plus) on high-impact areas. Includes custom 3M 2080 series satin black vinyl wrap on the roof and mirrors.

Custom aero package: Varis Japan Q50-specific GT wing (carbon fiber, 1800mm width, 300mm height, adjustable angle) with custom aluminum pedestals (AeroFab). Front splitter is a custom 3D-printed ABS unit (12" overhang, 3-stage canards) with integrated LED DRLs (Lux H8 V4). Side skirts feature integrated carbon fiber air curtains (AeroCatch) for brake cooling.

Interior overhaul: Recaro SPG-XL seats (Q50-specific mounting brackets, Alcantara/leather with red stitching) paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 carbon fiber wheel (350mm diameter). Custom roll cage by Custom Cages (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with bolt-in harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Shift knob is a weighted titanium unit from Cusco (Type-RS, 350g) with a custom leather boot (Nappa leather, red stitching).
